title: Limitless SMP S4
description: This is the modpack created for and ran on the Limitless SMP server's fourth season.
body:
This is the modpack created for and ran on the Limitless SMP server's fourth season.

This modpack includes many optimization mods such as Sodium and Vanilla+ content mods such as Chipped, Inmis, and Comforts, patch mods like Carpet, and quality of life mods including Litematica, and Minihud.

As mentioned in the summary, we are recruiting content creators to join our server, the discord link is in the "External Resources" section. There are people available in that discord to help with modpack problems as well!

This modpack is heavily based off of Fablously Optimized, which you can find here: https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized and some versions contain content from Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net
